name: Healthy Frozen Blueberry Yogurt
brief_description: A refreshing, creamy frozen yogurt made with just three ingredients. Perfect for a healthy dessert or snack, this no-churn recipe combines Greek yogurt, blueberries, and honey for a naturally sweet treat.

instructions.text: Combine all ingredients in a food processor. Turn the unit on and puree for 1 minute or until all the ingredients are well blended and the texture starts to get smoother.
Remove the blueberry yogurt mixture from the processor and transfer to a container with a cover. Place inside the freezer for at least 3 hours.
Scoop the frozen yogurt and arrange in a serving bowl. Serve as dessert or during snack time.

recipe_notes: For a firmer texture similar to ice cream, freeze overnight.
If using frozen blueberries, you may need to stop and scrape down the sides of the processor occasionally.
storage_notes: Store in an airtight container in the freezer for up to 2 weeks.
Let sit at room temperature for 5-10 minutes before scooping for easier serving.
